name: Easy Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugar and margarine until smooth.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Stir in the vanilla flavoring.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture, mixing until just combined.
5. Pour batter into a tube pan.
6. Place in a cold oven.
7. Bake for 1 hour and 10 minutes at 350°F.
8. Turn off the oven.
